meta.title: VentureNex — Build Teams, Launch Projects
meta.description: The AI-powered business directory that helps you plan projects, find the right people, and build teams — globally.

landing.headline: Find the right people. Build the right team.
landing.subheadline: VentureNex is the global business directory with an AI project planner that helps you scope ideas, discover talent, and assemble teams — all on one platform.

hero.dashboardSubtitle: Generate detailed project plans in seconds

features.title: Platform Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to go from idea to assembled team

aiPlanning.title: AI Project Planning
aiPlanning.description: Describe your idea and our GPT-4o agent creates a full project timeline — milestones, phases, tools, materials, and the exact roles you need to hire.

directory.title: Global Talent Directory
directory.description: Search 12,000+ verified professionals across 85 countries by skill, industry, availability, and rate. Real people, real profiles — no recruiters.

teamAssembly.title: Automated Team Assembly
teamAssembly.description: The AI matches your project requirements to directory profiles, sends confidential outreach, manages NDA signing, and builds your team — hands-free.

workspace.title: Secure Project Workspaces
workspace.description: Collaborate in private, invitation-only workspaces with milestone tracking, file sharing, threaded discussions, and real-time progress dashboards.

nda.title: Built-in NDA Workflow
nda.description: Project details stay confidential until candidates sign a legally binding NDA. No sensitive information is shared until you approve each team member.

meetings.title: Integrated Scheduling
meetings.description: Book physical, virtual, or hybrid meetings directly from any project workspace. Calendar sync, agenda sharing, and automated reminders included.

howItWorks.title: From idea to launch in four steps
howItWorks.subtitle: No job boards, no endless interviews — just describe what you need and let AI handle the rest.

step1.title: Describe your vision
step1.description: Tell our AI agent about your project. It asks smart follow-up questions to nail down scope, timeline, budget, and the exact skill-sets you need.

step2.title: Review your project plan
step2.description: The AI produces a structured timeline with phases, milestones, deliverables, resource needs, and estimated team composition — ready in seconds.

step3.title: AI finds and vets your team
step3.description: The agent searches the global directory for matching professionals, sends confidential outreach with NDAs, and ranks candidates by fit score.

step4.title: Launch and collaborate
step4.description: Approved members join your encrypted workspace. Track milestones, share files, hold meetings, and ship your project — all from one dashboard.

testimonials.title: Loved by teams worldwide
testimonials.subtitle: See what professionals are saying about VentureNex

items.name: Elena Vasquez
items.quote: VentureNex helped us assemble a world-class engineering team in 3 weeks. The AI planner nailed our project scope on the first try.

items.name: Raj Patel
items.quote: The NDA workflow alone saved us 40+ hours of legal back-and-forth. Now we onboard contractors in minutes, not weeks.

items.name: Sarah Lindström
items.quote: Finally, a platform that understands remote-first teams. The workspace tools keep everyone aligned across 4 time zones.

incentives.title: Join Today & Get Rewarded
incentives.subtitle: Early members unlock exclusive benefits that help you stand out, get discovered faster, and land more projects.
incentives.freeTokensDesc: Every new member receives 50 tokens on sign-up. Use them for AI project planning, priority search placement, profile boosts, and more.
incentives.earlyAdopterDesc: Stand out with a limited-edition Early Adopter badge on your profile. Shows you were here from the beginning and builds trust with project leaders.
incentives.verifiedBadgeDesc: Complete your profile and get verified within 24 hours. Verified members get 3x more project invitations than unverified profiles.
incentives.ratingsBoostDesc: Complete your first project and receive a ratings boost. Higher-rated professionals appear first in directory searches.
incentives.referralRewardsDesc: Invite colleagues and earn 25 tokens for each one who joins and completes a project. No cap — the more you refer, the more you earn.
incentives.aiTokensDesc: Get 5 free AI Project Planner sessions to scope, plan, and staff your projects. Each session generates a complete timeline, budget, and team composition.
incentives.ctaSub: No credit card required to explore. Age verification needed to participate in projects.
incentives.tokenDisclaimer: Tokens have no cash value, are non-transferable, non-refundable, and expire 12 months from issue. Tokens are forfeited upon account closure.

featuresPage.title: Everything You Need to Build, Collaborate & Ship
featuresPage.subtitle: VentureNex combines AI-powered planning, secure workspaces, and a global talent directory into one platform.
featuresPage.moreSubtitle: Every tool your team needs, built in from day one.

whiteboard.title: Collaborative Whiteboard
whiteboard.desc: Brainstorm in real-time with your team using an interactive whiteboard with drawing tools, shapes, and text.

transcription.title: Meeting Transcription
transcription.desc: Record team meetings directly from the whiteboard. Speech-to-text transcription with timestamped entries and export.

ratings.title: Team Member Ratings
ratings.desc: Project leaders rate members after completion. Higher ratings boost visibility in directory searches.

accessCodes.title: Project Access Codes
accessCodes.desc: Project leaders generate unique access codes. Every team member must enter the code each time they access the project.

aiReferrals.title: AI Referral Requests
aiReferrals.desc: When no match is found in the directory, the AI suggests posting a global referral request to find talent through networks.

discussions.title: Project Discussions
discussions.desc: Threaded discussions within your project workspace to keep conversations organised and searchable.

fileSharing.title: File Sharing & Uploads
fileSharing.desc: Upload, organise, and share documents directly within your project workspace. No third-party tools needed.

multiLang.title: 28 Languages
multiLang.desc: Full platform localisation in 28 languages including English, Spanish, French, German, Japanese, Chinese, Korean, Arabic, Hindi, Portuguese, Russian, Italian, Dutch, Swedish, and more.

featuresPage.ctaTitle: Ready to See It in Action?
featuresPage.ctaSubtitle: Create a free account and explore every feature with your team.

aboutPage.title: About VentureNex
aboutPage.intro: We're building the future of professional collaboration. VentureNex is an AI-powered platform that connects entrepreneurs, freelancers, and businesses to plan projects, find the right people, and build world-class teams — no matter where they are.
aboutPage.missionText1: Traditional platforms charge steep service fees, lock talent behind algorithms, and make collaboration harder than it needs to be. We believe finding the right people to build something great should be effortless, secure, and fair.
aboutPage.missionText2: VentureNex eliminates platform service fees, provides AI-powered project planning, and gives every professional the tools to showcase their skills, protect their IP, and collaborate in real-time — all in one place.
aboutPage.valuesSubtitle: The principles that guide everything we build.

transparency.title: Radical Transparency
transparency.desc: No hidden fees, no opaque algorithms. You see exactly what you pay for and how the platform works.

collaboration.title: Real Collaboration
collaboration.desc: Built-in workspaces, whiteboards, file sharing, and discussions — not just a directory of profiles.

security.title: Security First
security.desc: Two-factor authentication, project access codes, NDA e-signatures, and credit card age verification as standard.

innovation.title: AI-Native Innovation
innovation.desc: GPT-4o powered project planning, smart talent matching, whiteboard summarisation, and referral intelligence.

aboutPage.globalText: Whether you're a solo founder in Sydney, a design agency in Berlin, or a dev team spread across three time zones — VentureNex gives you the tools, the people, and the AI to make your next project a success. Available in 28 languages with support for remote, hybrid, and on-site teams worldwide.

whyJoinPage.title: Why Join VentureNex?
whyJoinPage.subtitle: Whether you're looking for your next project, building a team, or growing your freelance career — here's why professionals choose us.

reason1.title: Zero Platform Fees
reason1.desc: Unlike Upwork (20%) or Toptal (premium markups), VentureNex charges 0% service fees. You keep what you earn.

reason2.title: Global Reach, Local Feel
reason2.desc: Discover talent and projects in 28 languages across every time zone. Work remotely or on-site — your choice.

reason3.title: Build Your Reputation
reason3.desc: Ratings from real project leaders boost your search ranking. The better you perform, the more visible you become.

reason4.title: Everything in One Place
reason4.desc: Plan with AI, sign NDAs, collaborate on whiteboards, share files, and manage milestones — without switching tools.

whyJoinPage.tokensTitle: What Can You Do with Tokens?
whyJoinPage.tokensSubtitle: Tokens are your key to unlocking premium features across the platform.

aiPlanning.title: AI Project Planning
aiPlanning.desc: Generate complete project plans with timelines, budgets, and team compositions powered by GPT-4o.

priorityListing.title: Priority Job Posts
priorityListing.desc: Boost your project listing to the top of the directory feed so the best talent sees it first.

profileBoost.title: Profile Boost
profileBoost.desc: Appear higher in directory search results for a set period. Get discovered by more project leaders.

aiProfileOpt.title: AI Profile Optimisation
aiProfileOpt.desc: Let AI rewrite your bio and skills section to attract more project invitations and stand out.

proposalBoost.title: Proposal Boost
proposalBoost.desc: When applying to projects, boost your application to the top of the pile ahead of other candidates.

aiSummaries.title: AI Whiteboard Summaries
aiSummaries.desc: Generate AI-powered summaries of your whiteboard sessions to share with your team.

extraStorage.title: Extra File Storage
extraStorage.desc: Expand your project file storage beyond the free tier limit. Keep everything in one place.

referralBroadcast.title: Referral Broadcasts
referralBroadcast.desc: Post global talent referral requests when you can't find the right person in the directory.

whyJoinPage.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of professionals already building their next big thing on VentureNex.

investorConnect.title: Don't Just Pitch an Idea. Pitch Proof.
investorConnect.subtitle: VentureNex is the only platform where your pitch deck is generated from verified project delivery data — real milestones, real teams, real results. Not slides. Proof.
investorConnect.tagline: Don't just pitch an idea. Pitch proof.
investorConnect.problemText: 90% of pitch decks contain unverifiable claims. Investors hear promises, not proof. Founders build decks before they've proven they can execute. There's no link between 'I built this' and 'I'm pitching this.' Until now.
investorConnect.pillarsSubtitle: Everything you need to go from completed project to funded venture.

pitchDeck.title: AI Pitch Deck Generator
pitchDeck.desc: Generate an investor-ready pitch deck from your actual project data — milestones completed, team assembled, budget spent, deliverables shipped.

features.0: Pulls real data from your VentureNex project
features.1: 10-slide deck with cover, problem, solution, traction, team, market, financials, and ask
features.2: Stamped with 'Built & Delivered on VentureNex' verified badge

dataRoom.title: Secure Investor Data Room
dataRoom.desc: Give investors controlled access to your project evidence — milestone reports, financials, team credentials, and signed NDAs.

features.0: Token-gated access links for each investor
features.2: Activity tracking — see who viewed what and when

roadmap.title: Phase Roadmap Builder
roadmap.desc: AI generates future phases based on what you delivered in Phase 1, complete with budgets, timelines, and team requirements.

features.1: Builds on verified Phase 1 delivery data

livePitch.title: Live Pitch Room
livePitch.desc: Schedule private video pitch sessions — like a personal demo day — where matched investors join to hear your story.

features.0: Integrated video conferencing with screen share
features.1: Pitch deck auto-presented alongside your video

investorConnect.diffSubtitle: Every pitch is backed by platform-verified execution data. No other platform offers this.

verified.title: Verified Execution Badge
verified.desc: Every pitch deck is stamped with proof that the project was actually built and delivered on VentureNex.

realData.title: Real Traction Data
realData.desc: Milestones, budgets, and timelines pulled directly from the project workspace — not self-reported.

aiPowered.title: AI-Generated Narrative
aiPowered.desc: GPT-4o crafts a compelling pitch narrative from your project data, market context, and team strengths.

ndaProtected.title: NDA-Protected IP
ndaProtected.desc: All team members signed NDAs on-platform. Investors can verify IP protection is already in place.

teamRated.title: Rated & Verified Team
teamRated.desc: Every team member has a verified profile with ratings from past project leaders. Real credibility.

multiPhase.title: Multi-Phase Vision
multiPhase.desc: AI-generated future phases show investors you have a clear, data-backed roadmap beyond Phase 1.

investorConnect.pricingText: Investor Connect is available on Professional and Enterprise plans. AI pitch deck generation and data room access also cost tokens. See pricing for details.
investorConnect.ctaSubtitle: Build your project on VentureNex, then pitch it to investors with verified execution data that no other platform can offer.

investorDashboard.title: Investor Connect
investorDashboard.subtitle: Generate pitch decks, manage your data room, and schedule live pitches — all powered by your real project data.

pitch.generateDesc: Our AI will pull data from your completed project — milestones, team, budget, and deliverables — to create a 10-slide investor-ready pitch deck.
pitch.deckSub: Generated from verified project data · 10 slides
pitch.verifiedDesc: This pitch deck is stamped with 'Built & Delivered on VentureNex' — proof that the project was actually completed on the platform.
pitch.shareDesc: Send your pitch deck using the same access-code authentication used by your project team.
pitch.shareAuthDesc: Investors receive a unique access code via email — the same auth used by project team members.
pitch.shareEncryptDesc: Deck is encrypted in transit and at rest. Only authenticated recipients can view.
pitch.shareTrackDesc: See exactly when the investor opened your deck and which slides they viewed.

room.title: Investor Data Room
room.subtitle: Secure, tokenised access for investors to review your project evidence.
room.ndaDesc: Require investors to sign an NDA before accessing your data room — the same e-signature flow used with project team members.
room.ndaSameFlowDesc: Uses the same e-signature and NDA template system as your project workspace. Consistent, legally binding.
room.ndaEnforcedDesc: Data room documents are locked until the investor signs the NDA. No signature, no access.
room.accessDesc: Each investor receives a unique link that expires after 30 days. You can revoke access at any time. All document views are tracked.

roadmap.title: Phase Roadmap
roadmap.subtitle: AI-generated future phases based on your Phase 1 delivery data.

live.title: Live Pitch Sessions
live.subtitle: Schedule private video pitches with interested investors.
live.scheduleDesc: Pick a date and time. We'll send invitations to matched investors and set up a private video room.

0.title: Schedule
0.desc: Pick a date and time. Set your pitch duration and topic.

1.title: Invite
1.desc: We notify matched investors. They confirm attendance.

2.title: Pitch
2.desc: Present live with your deck auto-displayed. Take Q&A in real-time.

compare.title: How VentureNex Stacks Up
compare.subtitle: See exactly how we compare to the platforms you already know. More features, zero service fees, built for real collaboration.
compare.ctaSub: Join thousands of professionals who switched to a better platform.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have a question, feedback, or partnership inquiry? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.officeAddress: Distributed team — Melbourne, AU & San Francisco, US
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us more about your inquiry...
contact.successMessage: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 1–2 business days.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: VentureNex ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our platform.

dataCollection.title: 1. Information We Collect
dataCollection.content: We collect information you provide directly, including your name, email address, profile information, project details, and payment information. We also automatically collect device information, IP addresses, browser type, usage patterns, and cookies when you interact with our platform.

dataUsage.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
dataUsage.content: We use your information to provide and maintain our services, process transactions, send communications, improve our platform, enforce our terms, and comply with legal obligations. We may also use anonymised data for analytics and service improvement.

dataSecurity.title: 3. Data Security
dataSecurity.content: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption in transit (TLS 1.3), encryption at rest, two-factor authentication, and regular security audits. While we strive to protect your data, no method of electronic transmission or storage is 100% secure.

cookies.title: 4. Cookies and Tracking
cookies.content: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management, and optional analytics cookies to understand how users interact with our platform. You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings. See our Cookie Policy for more details.

thirdParties.title: 5. Third-Party Services
thirdParties.content: We share data with trusted third-party services including Firebase (infrastructure), Stripe (payments), OpenAI (AI features), and Resend (email). Each provider is bound by their own privacy policies and our data processing agreements.

dataRetention.title: 6. Data Retention
dataRetention.content: We retain your data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide services. Upon account deletion, we remove your personal data within 30 days, except where retention is required by law or for legitimate business purposes.

userRights.title: 7. Your Rights
userRights.content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data; object to or restrict processing; request data portability; and withdraw consent. To exercise these rights, contact us at privacy@venturenex.com. We respond to all requests within 30 days.

changes.title: 8. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date. Your continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance.

privacy.contactNote: For privacy-related inquiries, contact us at privacy@venturenex.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of VentureNex. By creating an account or using our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using VentureNex, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to these Terms and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, you may not use our services.

eligibility.title: 2. Eligibility
eligibility.content: You must be at least 18 years of age to use VentureNex. By creating an account, you represent and warrant that you meet this age requirement and have the legal capacity to enter into these Terms.

accountResponsibility.title: 3. Account Responsibility
accountResponsibility.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials, including your two-factor authentication. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorised access. You are liable for all activity under your account.

acceptableUse.title: 4. Acceptable Use
acceptableUse.content: You agree not to use VentureNex for any unlawful purpose; post harmful, abusive, or explicit content; attempt to gain unauthorised access to other accounts or systems; scrape or harvest data without permission; or interfere with the platform's operation. Unsolicited recruitment activity — including headhunting, talent sourcing, and sending job offers to users who have not opted in — is strictly prohibited without an active Talent Sourcing subscription. Accounts found engaging in recruitment activity without the appropriate subscription will be suspended or terminated.

intellectualProperty.title: 5. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: VentureNex and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by VentureNex Pty Ltd and are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.

userContent.title: 6. User Content
userContent.content: You retain ownership of content you post on VentureNex. By posting content, you grant us a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free licence to use, display, and distribute your content in connection with operating the platform.

payments.title: 7. Payments and Subscriptions
payments.content: Paid subscriptions are billed in advance on a monthly or annual basis. Prices are subject to change with 30 days' notice. Refunds are handled on a case-by-case basis. You may cancel your subscription at any time; access continues until the end of the billing period.

projectCollaboration.title: 8. Project Collaboration
projectCollaboration.content: VentureNex provides tools for users to create and participate in collaborative projects. Project leaders are solely responsible for managing their projects, including but not limited to setting project scope, defining roles, establishing timelines, and coordinating team activities. VentureNex does not supervise, direct, or control the work performed by project participants. The platform serves exclusively as a collaboration facilitator and does not act as an employer, staffing agency, contractor, or joint venture partner to any user.

compensation.title: 9. Compensation, Employment & Engagement
compensation.content: VentureNex does not process, facilitate, guarantee, or mediate payments between users for project work. All compensation arrangements, including rates, payment schedules, methods of payment, tax obligations, benefits, insurance, and any other terms of engagement, are solely between the project leader and the participating team members. Project leaders are solely responsible for complying with all applicable employment, labour, tax, and contractor laws in their respective jurisdictions. VentureNex is not a party to any agreement, contract, or arrangement between users regarding compensation or employment and bears no liability for any disputes, non-payment, misclassification, or claims arising from such arrangements. Users are strongly encouraged to formalise their compensation terms in writing outside the platform.

termination.title: 10. Termination
termination.content: We may suspend or terminate your account if you violate these Terms. You may delete your account at any time through your profile settings. Upon termination, your right to use the platform ceases immediately.

disclaimers.title: 11. Disclaimers
disclaimers.content: VentureNex is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee the accuracy of AI-generated content, the reliability of third-party integrations, or uninterrupted access to the platform.

limitation.title: 12. Limitation of Liability
limitation.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, VentureNex shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the platform, including but not limited to damages arising from project collaboration, compensation disputes, or any arrangements between users.

governingLaw.title: 13. Governing Law
governingLaw.content: These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of Victoria, Australia. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Victoria, Australia.

changes.title: 14. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Material changes will be communicated via email or platform notification at least 30 days before taking effect.

terms.contactNote: For questions about these Terms, contact us at legal@venturenex.com.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how VentureNex uses cookies and similar technologies when you visit our platform.

whatAreCookies.title: 1. What Are Cookies
whatAreCookies.content: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the site remember your preferences, keep you signed in, and understand how you use the service.

howWeUse.title: 2. How We Use Cookies
howWeUse.content: We use cookies for authentication (keeping you signed in), security (CSRF protection, session management), preferences (language, theme), and analytics (understanding usage patterns to improve our platform).

typesOfCookies.title: 3. Types of Cookies We Use
typesOfCookies.content: Essential cookies: Required for core functionality — authentication, session management, and security. These cannot be disabled. Functional cookies: Remember your preferences such as language and display settings. Analytics cookies: Help us understand how visitors interact with our platform.

thirdPartyCookies.title: 4. Third-Party Cookies
thirdPartyCookies.content: Some cookies are placed by third-party services we use, including Firebase (authentication and analytics), Stripe (payment processing), and Vercel (performance analytics). These services have their own cookie policies.

managingCookies.title: 5. Managing Cookies
managingCookies.content: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to block or delete cookies. Note that disabling essential cookies may prevent you from using key features of VentureNex, such as signing in.

changes.title: 6. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.

cookies.contactNote: For questions about our use of cookies, contact us at privacy@venturenex.com.
